text: Good morning! Can you pull up today's calendar and reminders?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Monday, January 13. You have the CareConnect stakeholder review at 3 PM, and pediatrician checkup for Lily.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Quick log: Prepping for the stakeholder meeting later today. I am negotiating my senior PM salary and signing the Vertex Health offer letter. I think we need a compromise before we commit.
title: Work Update

text: Interesting. Good focus area. Negotiation is key. Ensure the relocation package covers the Chicago to Frisco move. I'll keep tracking the API performance.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Just wanted to mention that prepping for the stakeholder meeting later today. We got beta feedback from clinics suggesting they need scheduling portal immediately. Let's see if we can optimize the code first.
title: Work Update

text: Logged that. Here is what I recommend. We should prioritize these clinic requests. Let's create a dedicated sub-task in the CareConnect backlog. I can prep some talking points for your meeting with Anika.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Ethan is working on a school assignment at the table. Mrs. Patterson says he is reading at a 5th grade level now. We want to make sure he stays motivated.
title: Kids School Update

text: Interesting. Great update. That's fantastic. We should continue his daily reading routine to support his growth. Let me know if he needs any more help.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Just wanted to mention that got hyperfocused on my workstation coding. Curiosity and Perseverance RTG decay rates differ. My ADHD hyperfocus really kicked in.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Interesting. That is a clean implementation. MMRTG heat management is complex. I've archived your propulsion notes. I've saved your custom configurations.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Sarah and I are looking at home listings in Frisco online. The refi quote saves us about $250 a month. Glad we are staying on top of this.
title: Finance Update

text: Sure thing! I've compiled the spreadsheet numbers. That's $3,000 annually. It could cover the Colorado trip or 529 plans. Let me know when you want to execute.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Quick log: Sarah and I are discussing screen-time rules for the kids. Ethan and Marcus Nguyen are playing in our backyard. We need to stay consistent with them.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. Toddlers are full of energy. Playdates are great for Ethan. I can add snack shopping to the Target list. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Just wanted to mention that reviewing my sleep tracker logs. I hit 18 miles of running this week. Feeling good about my routine.
title: Health Update

text: Interesting. Staying active is key. Great progress! The consistent stretching is keeping you stable. I'll save the mileage logs.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Just wanted to mention that prepping for the stakeholder meeting later today. Saying goodbye to my old colleagues in Chicago on my last day at MedFuture Systems. Hopefully we can align on this during the stakeholder review.
title: Work Update

text: Interesting. That sounds critical. It's important to keep in touch with old colleagues; they are a great professional network. I'll keep tracking the API performance.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Jarvis, Writing up user stories for our upcoming sprint. Greg Holloway wants to drop billing integration to save time, but Anika thinks it is essential. Anika is doing a great job managing the feedback.
title: Work Update

text: Interesting. Good focus area. I suggest a phased rollout. Shipping a basic version of billing integration now and iterating later is a good compromise. I'll save this reasoning in our engineering scratchpad.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Just wanted to mention that sarah attended the parent-teacher conference today. He is stuck on a math word problem involving division. He is really putting in the effort.
title: Kids School Update

text: Logged that. I can help with that. Try using visual diagrams to explain remainders. He'll get it quickly. His curiosity is really impressive.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Just wanted to mention that modified the smart-home alert integrations. Scraping astrophotography files from Hubble. Nice to combine space science and coding.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Sure thing! That is a clean implementation. Hubble raw FITS files are great. I'll track the download folder sync. I've saved your custom configurations.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Calculating some savings estimates. The refi quote saves us about $250 a month. Every bit of savings helps.
title: Finance Update

text: Got it, Mike. Refinancing is a great leverage point. That's $3,000 annually. It could cover the Colorado trip or 529 plans. Let me know when you want to execute.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Sarah and I are discussing screen-time rules for the kids. She had a massive tantrum about brushing her teeth. Parenting is a constant learning process.
title: Parenting Update

text: Logged that. Bedtime can be a challenge. Tantrums are tough at age 3. Turning brushing into a game or song might help. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick update: Tracking my weekly fitness metrics. The pediatrician says Lily is growing on track. Health has to be a priority.
title: Health Update

text: Staying active is key. Excellent news. The pediatric report is saved in Lily's folder. I'll save the mileage logs.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Time to log today's thoughts, Jarvis. CareConnect meetings took up most of the day. Dealt with bedtime tantrums but made it through. CareConnect prep is moving along. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Reflections saved. Rest up for tomorrow!
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
